heading: Engineering and environmental innovations of national significance
label: 2313a Engineering and environmental innovations of national significance
notes: CodificationSection was enacted as part of the Water Resources Development Act of 1996, and not as part of the Water Resources Development Act of 1986 which comprises this chapter.
“Secretary” DefinedSecretary means the Secretary of the Army, see , set out as a note under .section 2 of Pub. L. 104–303section 2201 of this title

children.heading: Surveys, plans, and studies
children.label: a Surveys, plans, and studies
children.text: To encourage innovative and environmentally sound engineering solutions and innovative environmental solutions to problems of national significance, the Secretary may undertake surveys, plans, and studies and prepare reports that may lead to work under existing civil works authorities or to recommendations for authorizations.

children.heading: Authorization of appropriations
children.label: 1 Authorization of appropriations
children.text: There is authorized to be appropriated to carry out this section $1,000,000 for each of fiscal years 1997 through 2000.

children.heading: Funding from other sources
children.label: 2 Funding from other sources
children.text: The Secretary may accept and expend additional funds from other Federal agencies, States, or non-Federal entities for purposes of carrying out this section.
